creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-510-kmod/#description> includes: 

> WWW: https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod/

– however, there's no hint that for this port, it's preferable to use GitHub (not Bugzilla) for issues. 

Please consider adding a hint to the package description. Thanks. 

Ref: <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/blob/d4d49b874b1613bc3f41085d744fb7edc14e28c3/UPDATING#L26-L34>
